data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for emergency override functionality.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the emergency override feature, which allows a manager to force assignment. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the existence or functionality of this feature. The linked use case mentions the need for an emergency override but does not provide concrete evidence that it is implemented or operational in the current saga run.
gaps: No evidence of the emergency override functionality being implemented or tested.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for emergency override
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the emergency override functionality.
